name: Copy2Paste
description: Drag to select any area of a webpage, like Lightshot, to copy text (with on-device OCR for text baked into images/video) or an image — plus a webpage color analyzer and a color picker with a live preview.

action.default_title: Copy2Paste — click for options, or use a shortcut (Alt+0 text / Alt+Shift+0 image / Alt+Shift+C color)

toggle-color-picker.description: Pick a color from the page
